title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXVII. Natural History.
content:
Leg over leg,
            As the dog went to Dover;
        When he came to a stile,
            Jump he went over.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXVII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
